title: Bocchi the Block!
description: Bocchi the Rock... as a Block!
body:
# Bocchi the Block!
Bocchi the Rock... as a Block! Bocchi the Block???

ぼっち・ざ・ろっく？　ぼっち・ざ・ぶろっく！

## Features
![Bocchi Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DnNukrn0/images/048a823d5291a43367d0e149ba153e6fb19bd4c2.png)
### Bocchi Block!
  - Can be right-clicked to be made panicked/unpanicked.
  - If panicking and player is in 64 blocks radius, moves forward
  - If facing Magma Block while panicking and player is in 64 blocks radius, turns around.
  - If facing Magenta Glazed Terracotta (the arrow one) while panicking and player is in 8 blocks radius, will turn to the direction arrow Bocchi Block is facing.
  - Panicking status can be activated/deactivated with Redstone signal
  - If Note Block is placed above Bocchi Block, it will make Guitar sound when played.
  - Can now emit comparator signal (one when not panicking and two when panicking)
  - Multiple Bocchi Blocks can go backwards if the first one in line is facing backwards


  - Craft with 2 Magenta Dyes, 1 Pink Dye, 4 Strings, 1 Piston, and 1 TNT
![Bocchi Block Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DnNukrn0/images/1d558e68c9096bf6912126a094cf9bbf341f8813.png)

## Kita Block
![Kita Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DnNukrn0/images/d02e0612d6e9d3c42d043dff15c65e78fbab221e.png)
  - If activated, acts like sun within 8 block radius, burning undead mobs.
  - Emits light level of 15
  - Can be activated with Redstone
  - Recipe will come at a later date

There will be more blocks coming soon so stay tuned!
